name: fl03-skills
description: FL03's personal skill marketplace for Claude Code — covering Rust, WebAssembly, quantitative finance, Polymarket trading, workflow orchestration, and more. Each skill is independently installable.

plugins.name: finance
plugins.description: Research-grade quantitative finance. PhD-level toolkit covering stochastic calculus, derivative pricing (Black-Scholes + Greeks, Heston, Merton jump-diffusion, American options), risk metrics (VaR/CVaR/Sharpe/Sortino/Calmar), portfolio theory, term-structure models, Monte Carlo with variance reduction, and backtesting. Grounded against Hull / Bjork / Wilmott / Glasserman.

plugins.name: polymarket
plugins.description: Polymarket exchange reference for Polygon prediction markets. Covers pUSD collateral, CTF binary + negative-risk markets, L1/L2 authentication, relayer-v2, UMA optimistic-oracle resolution with 2h challenge window, per-market fees, and the token_id / condition_id ladder. Ships dedicated apis.md, strategies.md, and exploits.md companion files (Context7-grounded against docs.polymarket.com).

plugins.name: rust
plugins.description: Make any agent fluent in idiomatic Rust. Covers ownership, borrowing, lifetimes, async, traits, the no_std/alloc/std tier system, and macros. Ships dedicated cargo.md and rustc.md companion references (Context7-grounded against The Cargo Book and The Rustc Book).

plugins.name: trader
plugins.description: Generalized autonomous trading agent. 9-gate safety contract, 7-step cycle, drawdown rules, operator autonomy grant, and full Axiom MCP tool reference (verified against the axiom-mcp server source). Exchange-agnostic — pair with @polymarket for opportunity playbooks.

plugins.name: typing
plugins.description: Language-agnostic advanced type-system knowledge. Covers parametric/ad-hoc/subtype/row polymorphism, variance, kinds, HKTs, type classes vs traits, GADTs, type-level programming, dependent and refinement types across Haskell, Idris/Agda/Lean, OCaml, Scala, TypeScript, F*, and Liquid Haskell. Ships dependent-types.md and type-level-programming.md companion references.

plugins.name: wasmtime
plugins.description: Rust-side host embedding of wasmtime. Engine/Store/Linker/Component lifecycle, bindgen! macro for WIT, WASI capability grants, &self ergonomics via Arc<Mutex<...>>, hot-swap, error/trap handling, AOT precompile, async support, and debug surfaces. Context7-grounded against /bytecodealliance/wasmtime.

plugins.name: webassembly
plugins.description: Language-agnostic WebAssembly knowledge silo. WIT syntax (feature gates @since/@unstable/@deprecated, async stream/future, own/borrow resource handles, include directive), component model semantics + canonical ABI, WASI 0.2 capability model with the wasm32-wasip2 target, WASI 0.3 / wasm32-wasip3 trajectory, and the binary format. Companion to the wasmtime sibling skill (Rust host embedding).

plugins.name: workflow
plugins.description: Development lifecycle and release management. v{x}.{y}.{z}-dev.{i} branching with explicit rebase/squash decision tree, the automated patch-release pipeline (release.yml — tag, release, next-patch cut, version bumps, dev.0, orphan sweep, milestone roll), GH issue/PR/milestone conventions, Rust workspace scaffolding policy, and the version/sprint plan-file structure. Project-policy companion to the rust skill; cargo command semantics live in rust/cargo.md.
